## Video

{{ video_content | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Embed the video link or iframe here._]") }}

---

## What to look for

{{ what_to_notice | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-3 specific points for the learner to focus on while watching._]") }}

---

## Key ideas

{{ key_ideas | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Summarize the main concepts presented in the video._]") }}

---

## Follow-up

{{ follow_up | default("[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Suggest a next step or related resource after viewing._]") }}

---
